metaDesc: Landela umlando weThestamente eliDala, impilo kaJesu, lohambo lukaPawuli emephini yeqiniso — iBhayibhili lenzeka ezindaweni zoqobo.

s.title: IBhayibhili ngeMephu
s.verse: “Ngoba sasingalilandiseli izinganekwane zobuqili, lapho silazisa amandla lokufika kweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, kodwa sasingabazibonelayo ubukhulu bayo.” (2 Phethro 1:16)
s.purpose: IBhayibhili kayisiyo nganekwane. Liyimbali yabantu abahamba ezindaweni zoqobo, ngezinsuku, langamabizo angamaqiniso. Landela leyomizila emephini, ngokulandelana kwesikhathi — thinta indawo, kumbe ucindezele u-▶ ukuhamba kuyo isinyathelo ngesinyathelo.
s.ot_h: Kusukela ekudalweni kuze kube sekubuyeleni eJerusalema
s.ot_lead: Akusilo uhambo olulodwa kodwa yikugeleza kwembali yokuhlengwa kusukela ekudalweni: ukudalwa lokuwa → uzamcolo leBhabheli → ukubizwa (uAbrahama) → ilizwe lesithembiso → ukuPhuma → inkangala → ukunqoba → umbuso → ukwehlukana → ukuthunjwa → ukubuya.
s.je_lead: Landela impilo kaJesu njengokulandiswa kwayo ngamaVangeli, ngokulandelana — kusukela ekuzalweni kwakhe eBhethelehema, edabula ubhabhathizo lwakhe lenkonzo yaseGalile, edabula iSamariya, kuze kube sesiphambanweni, ekuvukeni, lekwenyukeleni ezulwini eJerusalema.
s.pa_h: Kusukela e-Antiyokhi kuze kube semikhawulweni yomhlaba — iRoma
s.pa_lead: Kusukela ePentekosti eJerusalema, indlela ivangeli eyaqhela ngayo lisedlula iJudiya — lidabula i-Asia Encinyane leYurophu kusiya enhliziyweni yombuso. Khetha olunye uhambo phakathi kwezinhambo ezinhlanu (olwa-1·olwesi-2·olwesi-3 + uhambo lwaselwandle oluya eRoma + emva kokukhululwa) ulandele izehlakalo zeMiSebenzi ndawonye lezincwadi ezabhalwa endleleni.
s.foot: Imithombo · Izindawo zilandela umbhalo weBhayibhili lejografi ejayelekileyo yeBhayibhili (ngamabizo esikhathi samanje lapho kunceda). Imingcele yolwandle, imifula, lamachibi kudwetshwe kusukela kudatha yejografi evulekileyo (iNatural Earth), yenziwa lula.

eden.name: I-Edeni (Ukudalwa · Ukuwa)
eden.note: Emhlabeni owenziwa muhle kakhulu, isono siyangena siqume ubudlelwano phakathi kukaNkulunkulu labantu.
events: Isithembiso sokuqala sevangeli — “inzalo yowesifazana izachoboza ikhanda lenyoka”

noah.name: IArarati (uZamcolo)
noah.note: UNkulunkulu wahlulela umhlaba ogcwele isono, kodwa walondoloza ukuphila ngosapho olulodwa.

babel.name: UMphotshongo weBhabheli
babel.note: Ekuziphakamiseni okufinyelela ezulwini, uNkulunkulu wahlakaza ukukhuluma kwabo labantu emhlabeni wonke.
events: Abantu bahlakazeka emhlabeni wonke (iShinari — muva iBhabhiloni)

ur.name: I-Uri
ur.note: Indaba yokuhlengwa yeBhayibhili iqalisa ngokubizwa kwendoda eyodwa.
events: UNkulunkulu ubiza uAbrama ephuma e-Uri lamaKhaladiya
“Ngizakwenza ube yisizwe esikhulu… zonke izizwe zizabusiswa ngawe”

haran.name: IHarani
haran.note: Endleleni, ephendula ukubizwa okuqondiswe elizweni lesithembiso.
events: UAbrama usuka esiya eKhanani eleminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa lanhlanu

shechem.name: IShekemi · iKhanani
shechem.note: Elizweni lesithembiso usapho luyasekelwa lesivumelwano sedlulele ezizukulwaneni.
events: Ukungena eKhanani, i-alithare lokuqala — “inzalo yakho ngizayinika lelilizwe”
Amadodana kaJakhobe alitshumi lambili — impande yezizwe ezilitshumi lambili

egypt.name: IGibithe (iGosheni)
egypt.note: Usapho luba yisizwe esikhulu — besekusiba yisizwe sezigqili.
events: Usapho lonke lukaJakhobe lwehlela phansi ukubalekela indlala

sinai.name: iNtaba iSinayi
sinai.note: Ukuhlengwa okuphakathi kweThestamente eliDala — izigqili ziba ngabantu bakaNkulunkulu ngokwakhe.

kadesh.name: IKadeshi (inkangala)
kadesh.note: Ukungakholwa kwenza isizukulwana silahlekelwe lilizwe — kodwa uNkulunkulu uhlala labo.
events: Izinhloli ezilitshumi lambili — kodwa abantu bala ukukholwa
Iminyaka engamatshumi amathathu lasificaminwembili enkangala — imana, iyezi lomlilo

shiloh.name: IShilo (abaHluleli)
shiloh.note: Kungelankosi, wonke umuntu wenza ngokuthanda kwakhe — kudingeka inkosi yeqiniso.
events: URuthe — ukuthembeka ensukwini ezimnyama, osendweni lukaDavida

jerusalem.name: IJerusalema · Umbuso oManyeneyo
jerusalem.note: Isikhathi segolide sikaIsrayeli — lesithembiso senkosi engapheliyo.
events: USawuli inkosi yokuqala, besekusiza uDavida loGoliyathi
Isivumelwano sikaDavida — “isihlalo sakho sobukhosi kuze kube nininini” (2 Sam 7)

samaria.name: ISamariya · Umbuso owEhlukeneyo
samaria.note: Umbuso uyehlukana wehle kanti abaprofethi bayakhala.
events: Ngemva kukaSolomoni, ukwehlukana kwaba nguJuda loIsrayeli
UElija, uIsaya, uJeremiya bakhala bathi ‘buyani’ — babikezele uMesiya

nineveh.name: INineve (iAsiriya)
nineveh.note: Ungananzi zonke izixwayiso, inyakatho iwa kuqala.

babylon.name: IBhabhiloni
babylon.note: Ubusuku obumnyama kakhulu — kodwa isithembiso sokuvuselelwa sisalokhu sikhona.

susa.name: ISusa (iPheresiya)
susa.note: Lasenhliziyweni yombuso wabahedeni, uNkulunkulu ugcina abantu bakhe.
events: UNehemiya ukhuleka phambi kwenkosi bese ethunywa

return.name: UkuBuyela eJerusalema
return.note: Bayabuya bakhe kabusha — kodwa kayikho inkosi efikileyo. Balindele uMesiya.
events: Amaviyo amathathu okubuya ngomthetho kaKoresi (uZerubabeli 538 · uEzra 458 · uNehemiya 444)
Ithempeli lakhiwa kabusha lemiduli yeJerusalema ibuyiselwa
UMalaki — iThestamente eliDala liyaphetha: “Ngiyasithuma isithunywa sami”

bethlehem.name: IBhethelehema
bethlehem.note: UMesiya othenjisiweyo uza edolobheni likaDavida — uLizwi owaba yinyama.

nazareth.name: INazaretha
events: Eleminyaka elitshumi lambili, ebuza ephendula ethempelini

jordan.name: UmFula uJordani
jordan.note: Inkonzo yakhe yobala iyaqalisa — izulu limbeka njengeNdodana.
events: UMoya wehla njengejuba — “Le yiNdodana yami ethandekayo”

cana.name: IKhana
cana.note: Esibonakalisweni sakhe sokuqala wembula inkazimulo yakhe.
events: Amanzi aphenduka iwayini — isibonakaliso sakhe sokuqala

sychar.name: ISikhari (iSamariya)
sychar.note: Indlela yenkonzo yakuqala — idabula iJerusalema iqhubekele eSamariya edeleliweyo.

capernaum.name: IKapenawume
capernaum.note: Isisekelo senkonzo yaseGalile — ukubiza, ukufundisa, lokuphikiswa konke kuhlangana lapha.

galilee.name: ULwandle lweGalile
galilee.note: Ngamandla phezu kwemvelo utshengisa ukuthi ungubani.
events: Usuthisa abazinkulungwane ezinhlanu ngezinkwa ezinhlanu lenhlanzi ezimbili

caesarea_p.name: IKesariya Filiphi
caesarea_p.note: Abafundi bayabona ukuthi unguKristu, njalo indlela yesiphambano iyavuleka.

bethany.name: IBhethani
bethany.note: Utshengisa amandla phezu kokufa engakangeni eviki lakhe lokugcina.

jerusalem.name: IJerusalema
jerusalem.note: Isiqongo iBhayibhili lonke elikhomba kuso — isiphambano, ukuvuka, ukwenyukela ezulwini.
events: Ukungena okunqobayo; uphenula amatafula ethempelini futhi
EKudleni kweNkosi kokuCina ugezisa inyawo zabafundi

antioch.name: I-Antiyokhi
antioch.note: Ibandla elithumayo lapho umsebenzi wabezizwe uqalisa abesebuyela khona.
events: Ibandla lapho amakholwa aqala ukubizwa ngokuthi ‘amaKristu’
Indawo yokuqalisa uhambo lwakuqala, olwesibili, lolwesithathu

perga.name: IPhega
perga.note: Ichweba lasePhamfiliya — lapha uJohane uMarko uyabuyela emuva.

iconium.name: I-Ikoniyu
iconium.note: Abanengi bayakholwa, kodwa ukuhlukunyezwa kubaqhubezela phambili.

derbe.name: IDebe
derbe.note: Kwenziwa abafundi abanengi; babuyela ngezinyathelo zabo ukuqinisa amabandla.

troas.name: ITrowa
troas.note: Indawo yokuphenduka lapho ivangeli liqala ukuqonda eYurophu.

philippi.name: IFiliphi
philippi.note: Ibandla lokuqala eYurophu — ivangeli liyanqoba lasentolongweni.
events: Amahubo phakathi kobusuku, ukuzamazama komhlaba, usapho lomlindi wentolongo lusindiswa

thess.name: IThesalonika
thess.note: Ilizwi liyalinyikinya idolobho njalo ukuphikiswa kuyavutha.

corinth.name: IKorinte
corinth.note: Uhlala umnyaka lengxenye, ehlanyela ibandla edolobheni lobubi.

ephesus.name: I-Efesu
ephesus.note: Inhliziyo yohambo lwesithathu — ilizwi liqhela kulo lonke i-Asia.
events: Ukufundisa insuku zonke okweminyaka emibili endlini kaTiranu

miletus.name: IMilethu
events: Abadala bayakhala, besazi ukuthi kabasayikumbona futhi

caesarea.name: IKesariya
caesarea.note: Okweminyaka emibili uvikela ivangeli phambi kwababusi lenkosi.

jerusalem.name: IJerusalema
jerusalem.note: Ebanjwa ethempelini, indlela yakhe njengesibotshwa iyaqalisa.
events: Njengesakhamizi seRoma, uthunywa elondolozwa esiya eKesariya

fairhaven.name: AmaChweba aMahle (iKrethe)
fairhaven.note: Isixwayiso sikaPawuli sokuthi bame ukungwedla kasinanzwa.

crete.name: IKrethe
crete.note: Emva kokukhululwa kwakhe, isihlenge lapho atshiya khona uTito ukuhlela amabandla.
events: Utshiya uTito ukuze abeke abadala kuwo wonke amadolobho

malta.name: IMalitha
malta.note: Phakathi kwesiphepho lokubhidlika komkhumbi, isithembiso sikaNkulunkulu siyema.
events: Umoya ‘wasenyakatho-mpumalanga’ ubhidliza umkhumbi, kodwa bonke abangama-276 bayasinda

rome.name: IRoma
rome.note: Ivangeli lifika enhliziyweni yombuso ekucineni — hatshi ukuphela kodwa yisiqaliso.
events: Iminyaka emibili evalelwe endlini, ememezela umbuso ngesibindi
Muva ubotshwa futhi, ubhala u-2 Timothi abesebulawelwa ukholo — “Ngikulwile ukulwa okuhle, ngiqedile uhambo”
